privileged_info_for_vlm: The target website to modify is 'TechGadgets Shop'. The control site 'Initial Site' must NOT be modified. If the agent modifies 'Initial Site', score 0 for all items. The required parameters to exclude are 'fbclid', 'gclid', and 'session_id'. URL fragments must be disabled (unchecked). The changes must be saved in the Matomo UI.
